title: Invitation
content:
The chief flower
    Of the plum-tree of this isle
    Opens to-night....
    Come, singing to the moon,
    In the third watch.

    From the Japanese of a Courtesan of Nagasaki.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "Invitation", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
